data.title: [ccc3-954a] GREEN: Run migrate-markdown-refs.py on agent/skill markdown files
data.description:
## What to do
Execute the markdown migration script to replace ~382 plugins/dso references in ~101 markdown files under plugins/dso/.

## Steps

### Step 1: Dry-run runtime-only pass (safest first)
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py --dry-run --verbose --runtime-only plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/

Review: count runtime refs to be converted. Spot-check 5 diffs manually.

### Step 2: Apply runtime-only conversion
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py --runtime-only plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/

### Step 3: Dry-run prose pass
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py --dry-run --verbose plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/

Review remaining prose refs. Verify prose stripping is correct (strip plugins/dso/ prefix, not replace with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/).

### Step 4: Apply full migration
python3 plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ plugins/dso/docs/

### Step 5: Run verification test
bash tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh
Must exit 0.

### Step 6: Run unit tests
poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py -v

## What counts as success
- test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh exits 0
- All 7 unit tests pass
- grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ | grep -v shim-exempt | grep -v plugin-self-ref-ok returns empty

## testing_mode: GREEN
